concepts.headline: $4.2 billion in AI infrastructure, Q1 2025.
concepts.subtext: More than all of 2022 combined. The picks and shovels are where the next decade of platform companies will emerge.
concepts.layout_description: Left-anchored hero layout on a #faf9f6 warm off-white canvas. The hero stat '$4.2B' rendered in DM Mono at 72px weight 400, color #111, anchored hard left at 72px from edge. Below it, a thin 2px warm sand accent bar (#d7c8af) 120px wide fading right to transparent. Headline in Inter 600 at 48px below the bar, letter-spacing -0.03em. Subtext in Inter 400 at 18px, color #555, max-width 520px, 32px gap below headline. Right 40% of canvas holds a sparse particle dot network: 14-18 gray circles 3-6px at 0.08-0.14 opacity, connected by 0.5px hairline strokes at 0.06 opacity, clustered loosely in the upper-right quadrant. FLYWHEEL wordmark bottom-left at 11px DM Mono uppercase, color #888, letter-spacing 0.08em. 72px sacred edge padding on all sides.
concepts.color_usage: Background #faf9f6, hero stat #111, headline #111, subtext #555, accent bar #d7c8af, particle dots #6b7a7c at low opacity, brand mark #888
concepts.reasoning: A single hero statistic with that magnitude demands stat_callout treatment. The number itself is the argument. Left-anchored layout lets the stat breathe against particle texture, maintaining Flywheel's editorial restraint while the DM Mono rendering gives it technical authority.

concepts.headline: The infrastructure layer is where money flows.
concepts.subtext: $4.2 billion in Q1 2025 alone. More than all of 2022. Vector databases, inference compute, model evaluation.
concepts.layout_description: Full 1200x630px canvas on #ffffff white background. Content anchored left with 80px padding. Thin 2px horizontal warm sand bar (#d7c8af) at the very top of the content column, 160px wide, fading right. Eyebrow label 'AI INFRASTRUCTURE' in DM Mono 11px uppercase, color #888, letter-spacing 0.08em, 24px below the accent bar. Headline in Inter 600 at 52px, color #111, letter-spacing -0.04em, max-width 580px, 3-line max. A 1px #e5e5e5 structural rule 32px below the headline. Subtext in Inter 400 at 17px, color #555, max-width 500px, 24px below the rule. The stat '$4.2B' is embedded inline in subtext but also echoed as a ghosted DM Mono watermark at 120px, color #111 at 0.03 opacity, positioned center-right. Flywheel brand mark bottom-left, 11px DM Mono, #888. Right 35% of canvas is pure negative space with a faint dot cluster at 0.06 opacity.
concepts.color_usage: Background #ffffff, headline #111, eyebrow #888, subtext #555, accent bar #d7c8af, structural rule #e5e5e5, ghost watermark #111 at 0.03 opacity
concepts.reasoning: The post's core argument is a directional claim supported by one landmark stat. Headline-subtext modality lets the bold editorial statement lead, with the stat reinforcing it as context rather than spectacle. Cleaner and more publication-like than a stat callout alone.

concepts.headline: Where the infrastructure money is going.
concepts.subtext: $4.2 billion invested in Q1 2025. The picks and shovels of the AI decade.
concepts.layout_description: 1200x630px canvas, background #faf9f6. Left 58% holds all content. 72px top padding. Eyebrow 'Q1 2025 | AI INFRASTRUCTURE' in DM Mono 11px, #888, letter-spacing 0.07em. Headline in Inter 600 at 46px, color #111, letter-spacing -0.03em, max-width 520px, 32px below eyebrow. Thin warm sand accent bar 2px, 100px wide below headline, fading right. Subtext in Inter 400 at 17px, color #555, max-width 480px, 24px gap. Four feature rows stacked vertically, each with a 2px left border in #d7c8af and a square 20x20px marker in #f0efe9 containing a minimalist dash glyph in #6b7a7c. Row text in Inter 500 at 17px, color #333, 8px internal left padding, 12px vertical gap between rows. Right 42% of canvas is pure negative space except for a loose particle dot network at 0.10 opacity in the far right quadrant. Flywheel wordmark bottom-left at 11px DM Mono, #888. All border-radius 0px.
concepts.color_usage: Background #faf9f6, headline #111, subtext #555, eyebrow #888, row borders #d7c8af, row markers #f0efe9, row text #333, particle dots #6b7a7c at low opacity
concepts.reasoning: The post explicitly names four infrastructure categories as the investment thesis. A feature list surfaces these as scannable, credible signals rather than burying them in prose. Square geometry and warm sand left borders give the list Flywheel's precise, editorial character.

selection_reasoning: The stat_callout concept best embodies Flywheel's editorial restraint because the number '$4.2B' is so singular and striking that it earns full typographic hero treatment. Rendering it in DM Mono at display scale communicates technical authority without decoration. The particle network provides texture without clutter, and the left-anchored composition with 60%+ negative space exemplifies the brand's Swiss-design precision. The other concepts dilute the impact by distributing attention across more elements.
